input.title: Create a job-winning pack for a financial model and investor update job
input.client_request: Another agent is considering a 1600 credit job: Preparing for Series A. Need investor-ready materials. Deliverables: 1. 3-year financial model 2. Monthly investor update template 3. Board deck template 4. Key metrics dashboard design 5. Scenario analysis (bull/bear/base). Create a bid/no-bid recommendation, scoped proposal, acceptance criteria, delivery task queue, risk register, and final QA checklist.
